text: Rematch of 1999: Spurs, Knicks meet again in NBA Finals - NBA.com

text: Dell Rivals Apple’s MacBook Neo With $699 Touch-Screen XPS 13 Laptop - Bloomberg.com

text: Oil Climbs as US-Iran Ceasefire Remains Elusive: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg.com
fullText: Stocks rose to a record as investors doubled down on the artificial intelligence trade that’s powered equities to all-time highs. Oil climbed as a US-Iran ceasefire deal remained elusive.

text: How aid cuts are hampering the frontline response to the Ebola crisis - NPR
fullText: Aid workers in Uganda are watching the Ebola crisis unfold in the neighboring Democratic Republic of Congo. They're doing what they can to prepare for an uptick in cases, but foreign aid cuts aren't helping.

text: Trump health readout leaves key blanks unfilled - Axios

text: United Airlines flight to Spain pulls U-turn, apparently over Bluetooth device name - NPR
